pageTypes.name: Home Page
pageTypes.seoPurpose: National brand presence and broad keyword targeting
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to all active location pages, subject pages, curriculum pages, and key blog articles

pageTypes.name: Location Page
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to related subject pages, curriculum pages, location-subject pages, and blog articles about this location
pageTypes.conversionAction: WhatsApp inquiry about tutoring in this location

pageTypes.name: Subject Page
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to related location pages, curriculum pages, and location-subject pages

pageTypes.name: Curriculum Page
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to related location pages, subject pages, and location-curriculum pages

pageTypes.name: Location Plus Subject Page
pageTypes.seoPurpose: Specific city+subject searches like 'math tutor Bangkok'
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to parent location page, parent subject page, related curriculum pages, and related combination pages
pageTypes.conversionAction: WhatsApp inquiry about this subject in this location

pageTypes.name: Location Plus Curriculum Page
pageTypes.seoPurpose: Specific city+curriculum searches like 'IB tutor Phuket'
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to parent location page, parent curriculum page, related subject pages, and related combination pages
pageTypes.conversionAction: WhatsApp inquiry about this curriculum in this location

pageTypes.name: Blog Article
pageTypes.seoPurpose: Informational keywords and parent question answering
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to at least one relevant service page (location, subject, or curriculum)
pageTypes.conversionAction: Soft CTA to contact or learn more about related services

pageTypes.name: Parent Guide
pageTypes.seoPurpose: Long-form informational content for researching parents
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to multiple relevant service pages throughout the guide
pageTypes.conversionAction: Soft CTA to book consultation or contact

pageTypes.name: Tutor Recruitment Page
pageTypes.internalLinkRules: Link to about page and contact page

pageTypes.name: Contact and Booking Page
